GeneralDescription.SourceString: Twin-souled Elvin warrior from beyond the Fallen Oasis.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Twin-souled Elvin warrior from beyond the Fallen Oasis.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Mysterious elven warrior Etheria has been seeking a place to rest for eons. As the sky of this Island trembles with the power of these newcomer gods, will she find rest, or further strife?
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Mysterious elven warrior Etheria has been seeking a place to rest for eons. As the sky of this Island trembles with the power of these newcomer gods, will she find rest, or further strife?
